message:
Merge PR #2760: fix: witness notifies Mayor on polecat completion

Add notifyMayorSlotOpen to send SLOT_OPEN channel event and tmux nudge to
Mayor when a polecat completes, solving pipeline throughput stalls.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2760
Author: DreadPirateRobertz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
